claims.text: Devin Marsh is the Founder & CEO of Corevance.
claims.evidence: Founder's role confirmed in company deck.

claims.text: Devin Marsh previously worked as an Infrastructure Engineer at Stripe from 2017 to mid-2020.
claims.evidence: Public professional profile confirms full-time role at Stripe during this time period.

claims.text: Devin Marsh founded DataLoom in March 2019 and served as full-time CEO.
claims.evidence: Claim is supported by company deck, but not corroborated by funding records.

claims.text: DataLoom raised a $4M seed round and was acquired by Cisco in 2021.
claims.evidence: EDGAR search shows no record of Form D filing for DataLoom's claimed $4M seed round.

claims.text: DataLoom is not listed among Cisco's acquisition announcements in 2021.
claims.evidence: Cisco's acquisition announcements do not include DataLoom.

claims.text: Devin Marsh gave two conference talks at Stripe during his tenure: 'Building Reliable Payment Ledgers' in November 2018 and 'Infra at Scale' in September 2019.
claims.evidence: Talk references confirm his role at Stripe during the claimed dates.
